channel.title: web on My Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in web on My Hugo

item.title: Hugo Tips
item.description: Page Basic Info variable description .Title title item in front-matters .File file pathname relative to home (…/.index.md for sections) .IsHome true only for home page (this is quite obviously) .IsNode true for node (none-leaf-node in the content tree), including home page .IsPage true only for leaf-node, false for all nodes and home .Kind string value: home,section,page,taxonomy,taxonomyTerm .
